content:
Hello!
My name is Wahyu Wiyoko. I’m a software engineering expertise student. To know more about me, visit my portfolio website.
I made this blog for documentation and some notes, so that I don’t forget one day :D Usually, I will note a system configuration of a software or about other things and will be posted on this blog.
I use Hugo as a SSG (Static Site Generator) and PaperMod theme on this blog. Thanks to Aditya Telange for creating this beautiful and simple theme for the blog.
That’s all. Thank you for visiting my blog :)

title: Hello, World!
